title: Senior Teacher - Aakash Educational Services - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Aakash Educational Services - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the Aakash Educational Services family as a Senior Teacher in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Aakash Educational Services:
Aakash Educational Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aakash Educational Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
